# Chapter 11: Ethics under risk and uncertainty  (~80 pp)
- 11.1 Engineering ethics as practice, not aspiration (12) · 11.2 Codes of ethics and what they actually do (10) · 11.3 The duty to report and the duty to refuse (12) · 11.4 Conflicts of interest (10) · 11.5 Dual-use, surveillance, military: where the line is (15) · 11.6 Whistleblowing (10) · 11.7 Failure section: ethical compromises that became technical disasters (11)

**Archetype**: ethics. **Project**: write a personal ethics statement defining the work the reader will and will not do; defend with reasoning. **Exercises**: 15.
